sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ سَمِيرٌ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَحْمِلُ سِيرَتَهُ الذَّاتِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i nosio svoj CV.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and carrying his CV.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَهُدُوءٍ أَمَامَ الْمُدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovarao je na pitanja samouvjereno i smireno pred direktorom.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and calmly in front of the manager.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى سَمِيرٌ أَنْ يَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ الْمُمَيَّزَةِ.
sentences.translation: Samir se nada da će dobiti ovaj poseban posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir hopes to get this distinguished job.
